g.text: REST resources are used to handle HTTP requests and responses.
They interact with the DAO layer to perform operations.
Domain entities (POJO classes) are used to represent the data model.
They are used by the DAO layer to interact with the database.
These are simple Java objects that just hold data with properties (fields), getters, and setters
BaseResource is the base class for all REST resources.
It provides authentication and authorization methods.
the subscription of feeds by users.
it's uses entity and criteria classes to manage.
Similiare for all other DAO classes.
Mappers are used by QueryParams to map the result of a query to a DTO.
These QueryParam objects are returned by getQueryParam() methods in DAO classes.
SortCriteria and FilterCriteria are used by all DAOs to handle sorting and
filtering on queries. This logic is encapsulated in QueryParams and handled
Base class for all DAO classes and It's is responsible for managing POJO classe.
T: Data transer entity that acts as container for moving Data.
C: Criteria type used to specify the search or filter conditions for queries
and maintaining a search index for articles.
feeds in predifined intervals, parsing articles,
